message:
feat(fr-runtime): CLIENT INFO flags string parity (e/T/t/B/P/r/x) (br-frankenredis-s10v)

Upstream networking.c::catClientInfoString builds the CLIENT
INFO/LIST flags field by setting one character per active
session-mode flag, with 'N' as the no-flags fallback. Our impl
emitted only 'x' (MULTI) or 'N', losing every other observable
session-mode flag.

Wire the upstream flag-character set we model:
  * x = MULTI (was already present)
  * P = PUBSUB (subscribed to ≥1 channel/pattern/shard-channel)
  * t = CLIENT TRACKING ON
  * B = TRACKING BCAST mode
  * e = CLIENT NO-EVICT ON
  * T = CLIENT NO-TOUCH ON
  * r = cluster READONLY
  * N = no flags set (fallback)

Multiple flags concatenate (e.g. 'xPe' for MULTI + pubsub +
no-evict). Flags we don't model (M=master, S=slave, A=close-asap,
b=blocked, d=dirty-cas, etc.) remain absent — adding them would
require runtime state we don't track yet.

fr-runtime 280 passed; fr-conformance 184 passed; cargo clippy
--tests -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Slice of br-frankenredis-s10v (CLIENT NO-EVICT/TRACKING parity).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
